name: DJConnect Windows 3.1.1
body:
# DJConnect Windows 3.1.1

- Added public unsigned Windows and Mac Catalyst release publishing to the shared DJConnect app releases repository.
- Added English and Dutch What's New publication for Windows and Mac Catalyst on djconnect.dev.
- Fixed MAUI build setup for Mac Catalyst, including the platform entrypoint and Xcode 26.4 side-by-side build documentation.
- Added the Windows MAUI platform entrypoint and manifest files for CI/release builds.
- Updated release permissions documentation for GitHub Actions, release publishing and workflow cleanup.

---

Platform: Windows

Unsigned CI artifacts are intended for diagnostics and internal validation.
Windows artifacts are unsigned and are not a store/MSIX installer yet.
